title: A Skeleton in the Closet
original_title: Todos tenemos un muerto en el placard o un hijo en el clóset
overview: Manuel goes back to his hometown for his parents’ wedding anniversary, but he actually wants to ask money to move to Denmark with his boyfriend. Last time he saw his family, he came out of the closet. Since then, their relationship became tense. Manuel’s plans get ruined when his boyfriend dumps him.
